name: Marion Zimmer Bradley

acts.description: Posthumous accusation by daughter Moira Greyland of decades of sexual abuse by both Bradley and her husband Walter Breen
Known at the time to have protected and enabled husband Walter Breen, a convicted child molester

behavior_summary: Author of The Mists of Avalon was posthumously accused by her daughter of sustained sexual abuse. She also protected her husband, a convicted child molester, at the expense of his victims.

art.summary: Hugely influential in feminist fantasy fiction. The Mists of Avalon was a landmark feminist retelling of Arthurian legend that influenced a generation of female fantasy readers.

accountability_events: 2014 daughter Moira Greyland published account of abuse

verdict.blurb: She wrote feminist fantasy that empowered a generation of women readers while reportedly abusing her own daughter and protecting a husband who did the same. Her daughter's account is specific and heartbreaking. The Mists of Avalon has a very different aftertaste now.
